hypothesis: Add altitude-matching reward to teach drone what height to fly at. exp_023b showed model applies max thrust regardless — it never learns altitude control because proximity reward doesn't discriminate between being near gate vs flying through gate height. New alt_reward = alt_coef * exp(-3 * |z - gate_z|) peaks when drone is at target gate's altitude. Also survive_coef=0.3 rewards staying alive (longer episodes). Keep proximity_coef=2.0 (exp_024 showed 1.0 is too weak). Grace period bug fixed.
